LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, ASO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY. PLAINTIFF SHALL REMIT ALL REQUIRED TRANSFER FEES. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600 (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Continued To Sep-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Jun-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC's motion to transfer venue is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The case is transferred to San Mateo County. Plaintiff shall remit all required transfer fees. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru
